heroHeadline: Conservation Wins: 50+ Years of Species Pulled Back from the Brink
heroSubtitle: From 417 bald eagle pairs to 71,467 — tracking the greatest wildlife recoveries since the modern conservation era began in 1970
footerNote: Data sourced from IUCN Red List assessments, USFWS Federal Register, peer-reviewed journals (Science, Nature, Conservation Biology), and major conservation institutions including WWF, WCS, and national wildlife agencies.
